title: well_detect_boundary (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_detect_boundary`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_detect_boundary` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Boundary context is required for downstream dignity / sovereignty decisions.

boundary_type.description: §3.N — Symbolic boundary type. Same sentence safe in one boundary, harmful in another.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_detect_boundary output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
